title: Engineering Community
category: Social Impact & Community Development & Community Development
longDesc: The Engineering Community is an officially recognized Communitie operating under the Office of Academic Affairs (OAA) at Chandigarh University. It aims to foster student learning, team building, and professional development in its field.
